ModMetaData.name: [RealRim] Water & Pumps
ModMetaData.author: SIGSEGV11
ModMetaData.description: Physics-oriented replacement for Dubs Bad Hygiene water, hot-water, heating, sewage, sprinkler and air-conditioning systems. Reuses DBH buildings while providing separate fresh-water, hot-water, heating-water, waste-water and coolant networks with metric storage, flow, heat, waste and waterborne-pathogen accounting.
